a11y.introModal: Adjust the site display to your preference. Your choices are saved in this browser.
a11y.fonteDesc: Increase or decrease the text size across the site.
a11y.contrasteDesc: Increases color contrast for better readability.
a11y.temaDesc: Switches the display to a dark background theme.
a11y.dislexiaDesc: Replaces the typography with an easier-to-read font.
a11y.atalho2: Close menus, modals and the mobile menu
cookie.bannerText: We use cookies. We use essential cookies and, with your consent, performance and personalization cookies to improve your experience. Learn more in our Privacy Policy.
cookie.modalIntro: Choose which categories of cookies you allow. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for the platform to function.
cookie.essenciaisDesc: Required for login, security and basic platform functionality.
cookie.desempenhoDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the platform so we can continuously improve it.
cookie.funcionalidadeDesc: Remember preferences such as language, region and font size.
cookie.analiseDesc: Used in aggregate to understand platform usage trends.
herosearch.placeholder: E.g.: Drip rate, Braden Scale, Insulin, NCP...
seo.h1: የ Nursing ማስሊያዎች፣ የልምምድ ፈተናዎች እና ክሊኒካዊ ሚዛኖች
seo.desc: A complete platform with nursing calculators, clinical scales, medication dosage calculations and practice exams for public exams. Ideal for students, technicians and nurses who want to optimize daily practice, strengthen patient safety and prepare for exams.
sol.titulo: Solutions for every moment of your practice
sol.desc: Clinical tools, protocols, scales and educational content for students, nurses, managers and healthcare institutions — with digital accountability and measurable impact.
sol.card1.desc: Translated into more than 18 languages, covering over 140 countries.
sol.card2.desc: Over 60 automated clinical and care scales.
sol.card3.desc: Over 15 care calculators to solve everyday calculations in the profession.
sol.card4.desc: Interactive practice exams from leading exam boards, organized by topic with time and score tracking.
sol.card5.desc: A growing collection serving as an exclusive base of nursing literature content.
sol.card6.desc: A commitment to education through the development of exclusive literary content.
sol.card7.desc: Credit to literature and use of bibliographic references to guide scales and content.
sol.card8.desc: Information protection and data governance across all platform tools.
quick.desc: Access validated calculators and resources that make your daily routine easier.
edu.desc: Up-to-date, evidence-based content developed by experts.
edu.list3: Practice exams by board and institution
gestao.desc: Resources and indicators to support healthcare leaders and institutions.
tool.gestacional.desc: የእርግዝና ዕድሜ እና የወሊድ ቀን ይውጡ።
tool.notificacao-compulsoria.desc: በጤና ሚኒስቴር ማሳወቅ ያለባቸው በሽታዎች እና ሁኔታዎች መስተጋብያ ዝርዝር።
tool.sbar.desc: ለነርሶች ዲጂታል SBAR ቅጽ — ይሙሉ እና ያትሙ።
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem.desc: ከዋና የፈተና ቦርዶች እና ተቋማት 50 ጥያቄዎች፣ በሰዓት አቆጣጠር እና የመጨረሻ ውጤት ጋር።
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem4.desc: ከዋና የፈተና ቦርዶች እና ተቋማት ከ50 በላይ አዳዲስ ጥያቄዎች፣ በሰዓት አቆጣጠር እና የመጨረሻ ውጤት ጋር።
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem2.desc: ከዋና የፈተና ቦርዶች እና ተቋማት 50 ጥያቄዎች፣ በሰዓት አቆጣጠር እና የመጨረሻ ውጤት ጋር።
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem3.desc: ከዋና የፈተና ቦርዶች እና ተቋማት ከ50 በላይ አዳዲስ ጥያቄዎች፣ በሰዓት አቆጣጠር እና የመጨረሻ ውጤት ጋር።
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem-nucleo-de-se: ከጤና ሚኒስቴር፣ IBSP፣ ANVISA እና ISMP 50 ጥያቄዎች፣ በሰዓት አቆጣጠር እና የመጨረሻ ውጤት ጋር።
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem-doencas-de-n: በ GM/MS ትዕዛዝ ቁጥር 6,734/2025 ላይ የተመሰረቱ 50 ጥያቄዎች።
tool.simulado_vacinacao.desc: ስለ ክትባት 30 ጥያቄዎች (ጤና ሚኒስቴር እና SBIM)።
tool.simulado_pcr.desc: ስለ ልብ ማቆም 30 ጥያቄዎች (የፈተና ቦርዶች/AHA እና SBC)።
tool.simulado_bloco-operatorio.desc: ስለ ቀዶ ጥገና ክፍል 30 ጥያቄዎች (የፈተና ቦርዶች/SOBECC/COFEN)።
tool.flashcards_quiz.desc: ስለ የተለያዩ የነርስነት ርዕሶች መስተጋብያ ጥያቄዎች።
tool.biblioteca-provas.desc: ለነርስነት ፈተናዎች እና ልምምዶች ሰፊ ስብስብ ይድረሱ።
tool.apache.desc: ለአደጋ ላይ የወደቁ ታካካሾች ሁኔታ ግምገማ።
tool.asa.desc: ከቀዶ ጥገና በፊት የሰውነት ሁኔታ ምደባ።
tool.ballard.desc: የአዲስ የተወለደ ህፃን የነርቭ እና የሰውነት ብስለት ግምገማ።
tool.bps.desc: በማካኒካል ቬንቲሌተር ታካሚዎች ላይ ህመም ግምገማ።
tool.berg.desc: የታካካሹን ቋሚ እና ተንቀሳቃሽ ሚዛን ይገምግማል።
tool.bishop.desc: የማህፀን ባሪያ ብስለት እና የወሊድ ዝግጅት ይገምግማል።
tool.capurro.desc: የአዲስ የተወለደ የእናት አካል ዕድሜ መገመጫ ዘዴ።
tool.curb-65.desc: በማህበረሰብ የተገኘ የዳቄ ምች ጥብቅነት ግምገማ።
tool.elpo.desc: በቀዶ ጥገና ክፍል የግፊት ቁስል ግምገማ።
tool.lawton.desc: ለአረጋውያን በIADL ውስጥ የነፃነት ደረጃ ይለካል።
tool.manchester.desc: በአደጋ ማገጃ ክፍሎች የታካካሽ እንክብካቤ ቅድሚያ።
tool.meows.desc: የተሻሻለ የወሊድ ማስጠንቀቂያ ነጥብ / የሕክምና መውደቅ ይገምግማል።
tool.news.desc: ለአዋቂዎች ማስጠንቀቂያ ነጥብ / የሕክምና መውደቅ ይገምግማል።
tool.nips.desc: ለአዲስ የተወለዱ ህፃናት የህመም ግምገማ መሳሪያ።
tool.pelod.desc: በPICU ለህፃናት የመጀመሪያ ጥንካሬ እና አደጋ።
tool.pews.desc: የህፃናት ማስጠንቀቂያ ነጥብ / የሕክምና መውደቅ ይገምግማል።
tool.rancholosamigos.desc: ለአእምሮ ጉዳት ታካካሾች የአዕምሮ እና የባህሪ ንድፎች።
tool.silverman.desc: ለአዲስ የተወለዱ ህፃናት የመተንፈስ ችግር ደረጃ።
tool.tinetti.desc: በአረጋውያን ለመውደቅ አደጋ በመራመት እና ሚዛን ምልከታ ይገምግማል።
global.desc: We connect professionals, institutions and knowledge across more than 195 countries, promoting stronger, more collaborative and sustainable nursing.
newsletter2.desc: Stay up to date with updates, news and new releases.
newsletter2.consent: I agree to receive email communications and accept the Privacy Policy.
hero.title: የ Nursing ማስሊያዎች
hero.lead: The Nursing Calculators Global Platform offers tools, content and digital solutions to transform professional practice and generate a positive impact on health.
footer.newsletter-desc: Get exclusive content on nursing, management and health.
footer.brand-desc: Technology and knowledge for more efficient, sustainable nursing.
